what_it_does: A completion-criteria document for the Cognition Engine: a truth-table of what must be TRUE for the engine to be 'done', verifiable-by-use, with honest per-criterion status (proven-by-use / built-not-proven / gap). It organizes criteria into lettered groups (A direct authoring, B composition surface, C concurrency/loadout, D corpus/output sink, E run discovery/chaining, F robustness at scale, G the two faces) across Part 1, then Part 2 no-regression (foundation G0-G9 plus carried-forward and mode-reach groups H/I/J), Part 3 the corpus/discovery pillar (groups K-Q), Part 4 adversarial-fold corrections, and Part 5 two standing bars (agent-knowledge and self-describing-for-update).
observations: Status legend uses checkmark (proven-by-use), yellow (built-not-proven/designed), red (gap) markers throughout.
Stated method: criteria were discovered BY USING the engine (dogfooding MCP across 8 uses, mapping the repo's own 427 files), encoding a use->assess->reason->improve->write loop as the method itself.

Group A claims direct authoring works (create_role/skill/context apply live, no approval) with a commit ref; A4 enforces a build-dispatch floor (no path emits dispatch_decision or launches claude -p).
Group B (composition surface) is flagged as the active gap: every select/param must project from a registry with zero hardcoding; B2 makes field_types a richer type registry (the net-new keystone).
Group C: found the real concurrency ceiling — max_num_seqs:16 - R:2 = 14 is the binding cap while KV supports 44; the make is raising chat-4b swarm max_num_seqs to 34.
Group D: the scale test digested 427 files and DISCARDED them — the corpus sink (persist, embed-on-write, retrieve-as-input/RAG, cluster, queryable, purposeful chains) is largely a gap.

Group F: verified bugs caught at scale — F1 :// classification (address only if it STARTS with a registered scheme; 16% of files broke), F2 one poison unit discards the whole batch, F3 over-context files need chunk-and-compose.
Part 2 insists this is no-regression continuation, not a pivot (Tim mandate 2026-06-09), with an explicit no-regression coverage statement accounting for every prior item.

Part 5 defines two cross-cutting standing bars verified by a FRESH agent/session: BAR 1 agent-knowledge (discovery/per-tool descriptions/per-workflow skills/saved cascades) and BAR 2 self-describing-for-update (module constitutions/registry drift-homes/inline-why/tool-code traceability).
Open decisions are captured for Tim (e.g. rep_penalty vs legitimate enumeration, node-authoring line, pillar relationship).
standouts: The no-green-paint discipline: honest status with gaps that stay gaps, status found by use rather than asserted.
Concrete measured findings embedded as criteria (the 14-vs-32 concurrency knee; the 427-file discard; the :// classification bug).
The two standing bars framing AI-operable-with-no-human-devs: agents must know how to USE it (BAR 1) and how to EVOLVE it (BAR 2), each verified by a fresh agent.
The doc encodes its own construction method (use->critically assess->reason->improve->write) as the bar-keeping mechanism.
conventions: Verifiable-by-use criteria with explicit FUNCTION vs FORM grading (Form is half of done where a surface exists).
Registry-is-truth / reflects-never-owns / file-discovered / no-hardcoding as recurring laws.
Carry-forward discipline (nothing dropped; every prior item mapped into a group).
Dense, compressed prose with inline status markers and commit/file references.
concerns: Very dense and acronym-heavy (lane/group/criterion codes, abbreviations) — hard to parse cold without the surrounding build-prep context.
Many criteria reference external artifacts (other criteria docs, commits, file paths) that this file alone cannot resolve.
notes: This is the honest, use-discovered truth-table of what 'done' means for the cognition engine, spanning authoring, a registry-projected composition surface, concurrency ceiling, a corpus sink, robustness, two faces, and the two standing bars for AI-only operation and evolution.
questions: What is the current real status of the many red gaps (the doc is a snapshot dated around 2026-06)?
Where are the referenced sibling docs (IMPLEMENTATION-GUIDE, Research Synthesis, the concurrent-cognition criteria) that this triad supersedes-by-reference?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — it states it is the verifiable-by-use truth-table of done for the cognition engine and the body is exactly that across all parts.
apparent_themes: Found-by-use method as the bar-keeping loop
Corpus as the missing production sink (outputs->inputs)
intention_signals: Trying to hold the cognition engine to a real, honestly-graded, use-discovered completion bar that covers function, form, robustness at scale, a registry-projected composition surface, a durable corpus, and the self-knowledge needed for agents to both use and evolve it with no human developers.
novelty: Criteria literally discovered by dogfooding the engine on its own repo (427-file map) plus the two standing bars verified by a fresh, hand-holding-free agent — completion defined by an autonomous agent's ability to use and evolve the system.
contribution: Contributes the structured, honestly-statused completion definition for the cognition engine — the groups A-Q, the no-regression mapping, and the agent-knowledge + self-describing-for-update standing bars.
summary_for_embedding: A verifiable-by-use completion-criteria truth-table for the Cognition Engine, grouped across authoring, registry-projected composition, concurrency ceiling, corpus sink, robustness, two faces, no-regression carry-forward, a corpus/discovery pillar, and two standing bars for AI use and evolution.
intention_for_embedding: To define and honestly track what must be true for the cognition engine to be done, discovered by dogfooding and gated on a fresh agent's ability to both use and evolve it with no human developers.
